label: pure-backend
title: Fix rate-limit edge case in auth middleware
body:
# Fix rate-limit edge case in auth middleware

Correct a race in `middleware/rate_limit.py` where concurrent requests can bypass the bucket check.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] AC-1: Regression test exercises two concurrent requests hitting the limit boundary and asserts both share the same bucket decision.
- [ ] AC-2: No UI surface changes.
